infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SenseBridge needs camera access for obstacle detection and sign language recognition
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SenseBridge needs microphone access for voice commands and speech recognition
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SenseBridge needs location access for walking navigation in Blind Mode

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow SenseBridge to access your camera for obstacle detection and sign language recognition
